title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: This is nothing new, sadly! I attended PVAMU and in 2002, my parents paid the housing deposit and my tuition in full before we made our trip down to school and guess what? I did not have a place to stay. And I was from out of state. I had to stay with friends for a month until I got my housing!! I checked on my housing everyday after my parents left and I missed classes during this time and it negatively effected my grades that first month of school. I hate this is still going on.
author: @homehere9817

title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: Lol this has been the same thing for the last 10 years… but parents still keep sending their children smh
author: @Ki113rTofu

title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: Child that every university. Even during my time. Im been done 12 years now. Either you didn’t do your paper work, financial aid probation and didn’t appeal it. Suspension and didn’t even know it. Waiting for a scholarship Etc etc. stop this is not news. Are we making it news because it’s an HBCU?
author: @mikelast3146

title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: Now they are there with no water. Molded showers and no electricity.   Someone needs to find out whata going on
author: @prettylabella7887

title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: I knew there was more to this story, shocking.  ALL campuses can only accommodate X amount of students - period.  Then, as a student (and their parent since they are the ones griping) have a responsibility to have your application, enrollment, finances, etc. in order BY and BEFORE the date given to get housing.   This is life - actions and inactions have consequences.  The parents continuing to whine about this is outrageous.  You are all adults - you knew the rules and requirements - you didn't comply so you didn't get your housing.  Why does ANYONE have to tell you that?  You should've already known it!
author: @grogu_girl

title: Clark Atlanta responds to parents' complaints over student housing assignments
body: Per 1:08 min Yall always gotta make sure we look like a fool huh 🤔? Definitely could’ve had a better picture of that lady than that

Just throwing it out there, 2024 isn’t that long away

title: My Experience at Clark Atlanta University (My Honest Opinion) | Sarai Delysia
body: This school has caused so much frustration for my daughter! They demand she and all juniors and seniors move off-campus with very little advance notice! They have consistently had horrible housing options and now, if she does not pay $2800 before May 15th (another housing bill!), they will send her to collections and refuse to allow her to enroll in her Senior classes! Basically, throwing away her opportunity to graduate and left with bad credit and NO degree! I would NEVER RECOMMEND Clark-Atlanta to ANYONE! Do NOT send your child there!
author: @kendracummings538
